title: Decorative Gaming Consoles
body:
![A bunch of console variants on display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a6d192e0757123d2a1c23c4ebd4f60f720f3f38.png)
# Mod based in the mod "Decorative Video Game Systems"
## 📕📗📘 About this mod:
DG. Consoles adds a bunch of consoles from the current generation which you can use to decorate inside your home, these might have some silly extra functionalities though.
  - NDee Changer 1 & 2
  - Coolbox Series X.
  - Pay-Station 5.
 
## Plus some variants!
  - Cheaper NDee Changer.
  - Pay-Station 5 Digital Edition.
  - Pay-Station 5 Spider Edition.
  - Coobox series S.
  - and a bunch of recolors!
